use-cases: Maritime & Travel Apps: Used on maps or geographic interfaces to pinpoint lighthouses, coasts, or marine navigation points.
UI/UX Onboarding & Dashboards: Used metaphorically to represent a 'guiding light', onboarding tutorials, help centers, system status monitoring or 404 pages.
indicating a navigation beacon in marine dashboards
symbolizing guidance or guiding light in onboarding flows
flagging maritime safety alerts or maintenance tasks
